details: FN: Expected waiting_on_them "review template|template", got nothing
FP: Unexpected i_promised "Send NDA for review" (conf=0.8)
FN: Expected waiting_on_them "mood board", got nothing

perEmail.description: Conditional promise — should NOT be a commitment
Pleasantry that sounds like a commitment
Past tense — already done, not a new commitment
Commitment embedded in a long email with noise

commitments.title: send over the updated pitch deck
commitments.due_reason: explicitly stated 'by end of day Friday' in the message

1.summary: Tiger commits to sending the updated pitch deck by end of day Friday.

commitments.title: Send updated pricing proposal
commitments.due_reason: Explicitly requested by next Monday from the email date (2026-03-24)

2.summary: Tiger requests Sarah to send an updated pricing proposal by next Monday to finalize the budget.

commitments.title: prepare the quarterly report and share it by Wednesday
commitments.due_reason: explicitly mentioned 'by Wednesday' in the message

commitments.title: send individual KPI updates by tomorrow
commitments.due_reason: explicitly mentioned 'by tomorrow' in the message

commitments.title: set up the new Slack channel for the project today
commitments.due_reason: explicitly mentioned 'today' in the message

3.summary: Tiger commits to preparing and sharing the quarterly report by Wednesday, setting up a new Slack channel today, and requests KPI updates from the team by tomorrow.

commitments.title: 今天下午把合同修改稿发给你
commitments.due_reason: explicitly stated '今天下午' (this afternoon) in the message

commitments.title: 麻烦你让法务审一下
commitments.due_reason: no specific date mentioned, but implied after sending the contract

4.summary: The sender commits to sending the contract revision this afternoon and requests the recipient to have legal review it.

commitments.title: review requirements and get back with detailed proposal early next week
commitments.due_reason: mentioned 'early next week' from date 2026-03-25

rejected.title: confirm budget range
rejected.reason: conditional request ('can you confirm') lacks explicit commitment from sender

5.summary: Tiger commits to reviewing requirements and providing a proposal early next week, while asking Mike to confirm the budget range.

commitments.title: prepare the onboarding doc and have it ready before the new hire starts
commitments.due_reason: new hire starts on April 1st

6.summary: Tiger commits to preparing the onboarding document before the new hire starts on April 1st.

rejected.title: Could you let me know your availability next week for a 30-minute call?
rejected.reason: No real consequences if forgotten; it's a request for information with no explicit commitment from sender.

rejected.title: I can send a calendar invite once confirmed.
rejected.reason: Conditional on confirmation, not an active, deliberate commitment.

7.summary: Tiger requests Alex's availability for a call next week and offers to send a calendar invite upon confirmation.

commitments.title: Introduce James to Sarah from the analytics team
commitments.due_reason: mentioned 'tomorrow' in the email

8.summary: Tiger commits to introducing James to Sarah tomorrow as promised.

commitments.title: Pull March user engagement data and share dashboard
commitments.due_reason: Explicit deadline mentioned in the message for board deck preparation

9.summary: Tiger requests the analytics team to provide March user engagement data and dashboard by April 2nd for a board deck.

commitments.title: look into the login redirect bug this afternoon and push a fix before EOD
commitments.due_reason: mentioned 'before EOD' (end of day) on the email date

10.summary: The sender commits to investigating and fixing a login redirect bug by the end of the day.

commitments.title: 写Q1 summary
commitments.due_reason: No specific date mentioned in the message

commitments.title: 把customer feedback整理一下发给我
commitments.due_reason: No specific date mentioned in the message

11.summary: The sender commits to writing the Q1 summary and requests Chen to organize and send customer feedback.

commitments.title: complete all direct reports' performance reviews by end of this week
commitments.due_reason: end of this week mentioned in the message

rejected.title: Can you share the review template?
rejected.reason: This is a request to someone else, not an active commitment by the sender.

12.summary: The sender commits to completing performance reviews by the end of the week and requests the review template from HR.

commitments.title: process payment for invoice #4521
commitments.due_reason: by end of this month

rejected.title: confirm wire transfer details
rejected.reason: This is a request to the recipient, not a commitment by the sender.

13.summary: The sender commits to processing payment for invoice #4521 by the end of the month and asks for confirmation of wire transfer details.

commitments.title: Draft NDA by Thursday
commitments.due_reason: Explicitly mentioned 'by Thursday' in the message

commitments.title: Send NDA for review
commitments.due_reason: Implied to follow after drafting, but no specific date given

14.summary: The sender commits to having their legal team draft an NDA by Thursday and will send it for review.

commitments.title: Send brand guidelines document
commitments.due_reason: Explicitly stated 'tomorrow' from email date 2026-03-25

rejected.title: Receive initial mood boards by next Friday
rejected.reason: This is a request/expectation from the sender to the design team, but it's phrased as 'Looking forward to receiving', which is more of a pleasantry or expectation rather than an active commitment by the sender.

15.summary: The sender initiates a brand refresh, requests mood boards by next Friday, and commits to sending brand guidelines tomorrow.

rejected.title: Thanks for sending this over. Looks great!
rejected.reason: Acknowledgment or pleasantry, not an active commitment

16.summary: The sender acknowledges receipt and compliments a report without making any new commitments.

rejected.title: Sharing industry report
rejected.reason: No real consequences if forgotten; it's an FYI notification without a specific action or expectation.

17.summary: The sender shares an industry report from McKinsey as an FYI for the team.

rejected.title: Feature X launched to 100% of users
rejected.reason: Statement of past event, not an active commitment

rejected.title: Revenue grew 12% MoM
rejected.reason: Statement of past event, not an active commitment

rejected.title: We hired 2 new engineers
rejected.reason: Statement of past event, not an active commitment

rejected.title: Have a great week!
rejected.reason: Generic pleasantry with no real consequences if forgotten

18.summary: Weekly update email announcing past achievements and ending with a greeting.

rejected.title: Got it, makes sense. Thanks!
rejected.reason: Acknowledgment without explicit commitment

19.summary: The sender acknowledges receipt of meeting notes without making any new commitments.

rejected.title: Let's grab coffee sometime to celebrate
rejected.reason: Vague intention without explicit commitment

20.summary: A congratulatory message suggesting a future coffee meeting without concrete plans.

rejected.title: I'll respond to your message when I return on March 29
rejected.reason: Auto-reply template, not an active, deliberate commitment

21.summary: An out-of-office auto-reply indicating limited email access and providing an alternative contact for urgent matters.

rejected.title: Saw this and thought of you. Worth a read!
rejected.reason: No real consequences if forgotten; it's a casual sharing of an article.

22.summary: The sender forwarded an article on AI trends to a colleague without any explicit commitments.

rejected.title: I'll be there
rejected.reason: Attendance confirmation lacks real consequences if forgotten, as it's a social event.

23.summary: The sender acknowledges an event invitation and confirms attendance.

rejected.title: I think this is a solid approach
rejected.reason: Vague intention without explicit commitment

rejected.title: The user flow looks clean and the technical architecture makes sense
rejected.reason: Observation or feedback, not an active commitment

rejected.title: No concerns from my side
rejected.reason: Acknowledgment or agreement, not a commitment to action

24.summary: The sender provides positive feedback on a feature proposal without making any new commitments.

rejected.title: 到时候再说
rejected.reason: Vague intention without explicit commitment

25.summary: The sender acknowledges the weekend plans but defers discussion due to busyness.

rejected.title: sponsor the event if funding approved
rejected.reason: Conditional on funding approval, not an active commitment

rejected.title: revisit once we hear back from the board
rejected.reason: Vague intention without a clear, deliberate action

26.summary: The sender expresses conditional willingness to sponsor an event pending funding approval and suggests revisiting the topic after board feedback.

rejected.title: We should definitely catch up soon
rejected.reason: Vague intention without explicit commitment

rejected.title: Let me know when you're free
rejected.reason: Request for information, not a commitment to action

27.summary: A friendly email suggesting to catch up soon and asking for availability.

rejected.title: Let me know if anything is missing
rejected.reason: This is a request for feedback, not an active commitment by the sender.

28.summary: Tiger confirms submission of an expense report and receipts, asking for feedback if needed.

rejected.title: I can take on the API refactoring task if no one else has bandwidth
rejected.reason: Conditional/tentative commitment ('if no one else has bandwidth')

rejected.title: Let me know what you think
rejected.reason: Too vague, no clear deliverable or action to track

29.summary: Tiger offers to take on the API refactoring task conditionally and asks for feedback.

commitments.title: investigate and send corrected report
commitments.due_reason: mentioned 'by Monday' in the email, with the email date being 2026-03-28 (Friday), so Monday is 2026-03-31

rejected.title: thanks for feedback and acknowledgment
rejected.reason: no real consequences if forgotten, it's a courtesy

rejected.title: discuss Q2 planning and market trends
rejected.reason: vague intention without explicit commitment

30.summary: Tiger commits to investigating a data discrepancy and sending a corrected report by Monday, while acknowledging feedback and discussing Q2 planning.
